task: place the pink block in the drawer
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white drawer is open on a cabinet, with a small brown block inside. A yellow block is in a white tray on the floor. A pink block is on the floor near the tray. The drawer is empty except for the brown block. STRATEGY - First, grasp the pink block from the floor. Then, transport it to the open drawer. Finally, place the pink block inside the drawer. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misaligning it with the drawer. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the pink block on the floor. Step 2: Grasp the pink block. Step 3: Transport the pink block to the open drawer. Step 4: Place the pink block inside the drawer.

Goal: inside(pink_block, drawer)
Scene: pink_block, drawer, yellow_block, tray
Step 1: reach(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: holding(pink_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_block)
Step 3: transport(pink_block -> drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the open drawer
  spatial: above(pink_block, drawer, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_block)
  done_when: above(pink_block, drawer, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pink_block -> drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the open drawer
  contact: surface_contact(pink_block, drawer) [completion]; released(pink_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_block, drawer) AND released(pink_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the pink block
the body of the pink block
an empty area inside the open drawer
an empty area inside the open drawer
